content.instruction: Tap a card to see the meaning. Use Listen for pronunciation.

items.definition: Able to continue without harming the environment for the future
items.example: Riyadh is investing in sustainable transport.

items.definition: Basic systems a city needs such as roads, power, and water
items.example: Good infrastructure helps people travel safely.

items.definition: A device that detects light, movement, heat, or other signals
items.example: Street sensors measure traffic in real time.

items.definition: Working well without wasting time, money, or energy
items.example: An efficient metro saves people time.

items.definition: A person who lives in a city or country and has rights there
items.example: Citizens can report problems through a city app.

items.definition: A new idea, method, or invention
items.example: NEOM shows large-scale innovation in urban design.

explanation: Use Present Simple for facts and regular routines about cities.
Use Present Continuous for temporary projects happening around now.
Signal words: usually / every day → Present Simple; currently / this month → Present Continuous.

examples.continuous: The city is expanding coastal parks this year.
Engineers are testing a new sensor system.

content.prompt: Choose the best sentence about a temporary city project:
options: The council builds parks every year.
The council is building a park near our school this spring.
The council build a park now.
content.correctAnswer: The council is building a park near our school this spring.

content.prompt: Right now, many Gulf cities _____ (invest) in smart transport apps.
